explanation: Statement I is true (Sweating is the active release of a watery fluid onto the skin surface which draws large amounts of heat from the body as it evaporates). Statement II is false (Vasodilation is the widening of dermal blood vessels to increase blood flow to the skin, maximizing heat loss through radiation). Therefore, Only I is correct.
